channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Someone has Graffiti'd a swastika on the green box., 26th June
item.description:
Offensive Graffiti. Police made aware on CAD 5046/26JUN26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping/ rubbish bags littering the street near 40-42 Brooke road, 26th June
item.description:
Bins flying away and rotting in the sun,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double parking- unattanded cars outside Fios, 26th June
item.description:
Whenever the traffic wardens are not around Fios customers illegally double park outside their shop- usually these double parked cars are unattended. This is one example- unfortunately because the driver was very unhappy with me- I was only able to catch this mid-shot. Registration number available.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crown Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 26th June
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped household items such as a fridge and mattress outside of Block C, Guinness Court. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-60, Kirby Grove, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worn out hazard line, some still not repainted, 26th June
item.description:
Hello, most of the worn out lines have been repainted (from my previous report) but for a section on the bend near the entrance of Bishop Justus School has been missed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass has not been cut in months, 26th June
item.description:
The grass here is very long and needs cutting. The football pitch is currently unusable and the amount of grass seeds are causing problems for dog owners.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Apple Yard, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: See ref ref: 8362575 that you did nothing about and just closed it, 26th June
item.description:
You closed the last one when you can clearly see in the report the truck is still present as I updated it in December when you said you attended in November. This is it right now!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post light, 26th June
item.description:
Lamp post light not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, West Heath Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Around 59 Ritter street overgrown weed and trees and along the walk path all a mess, 26th June
item.description:
The council has abandoned the area and they collect council tax each month. Around 59 Ritter street SE18 4DU overgrown weed and trees. Along the work path along Ritter street all a mess fallen tree on the path way from 65 Ritter street when walking the path is obstructed. The area has been abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paget Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 26th June
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped by the 336 bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Food Waste Bin, 26th June
item.description:
Just left on grass verge, collecting rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brackley Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accessibility issues, 26th June
item.description:
Unable to access shaded areas towards junction of High Street/Kelsey Park Road/Manor Road due to raised pavement and stairs. No seating withing 50m of each of each other on way to park and in Kelsey Park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Kelsey Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish, bucket, 26th June
item.description:
There is so much rubbish here, please could this be cleared up? This area and the alleyway leading up to the school is terrible. It is so dirty and so many people pass through this daily.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitworth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Porthole forming again. This is the 3rd time we have had one in the same place., 26th June
item.description:
Pothole forming again in the same place. Due to the extreme heat this could cave in causing risk to residents and their vehicles. Residents are council tax payers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Oak Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree, 26th June
item.description:
A very mature Prunus tree which roots grow horizontally have disrupted the paving stones & are not recommended to be planted within a few meters of houses due to risk of damaging foundations. You can see cracking in the concrete below bay windows of 66.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince George Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sink hole, 26th June
item.description:
Looks like the beginnings of a sink hole near the same area with previous sink hole issues.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Oak Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree blocking view at junction, 26th June
item.description:
Can not safely see what is coming up the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Hill, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken road surface and potholes, 26th June
item.description:
This was previously reported by someone wise and marked as fixed it’s not been fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southill Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potential fire hazard dumped in block of flats, 26th June
item.description:
Household item has been left in hallway on 3rd floor flats for over 1 month. It is a painted wooden table (flammable) with sewing machine.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree meaning you can not safely see what is coming, 26th June
item.description:
When driving along south hill road you can not see what is coming up south hill from Elmstead lane due to very overgrown tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sylvester Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
